content.text:
<analysis>
a. Event type: This is a pull request opened event (PULL_REQUEST) with 20 changed files, mostly new files added for a mouse Tuba1a gene review.

b. Request type: This is a code review request. The user wants me to review the PR and provide feedback on code quality, potential bugs, performance, security, and test coverage.

c. Key information:
   - PR adds ISO-focused review of mouse Tuba1a annotations
   - 20 files added (no deletions): gene review files, publications, and data files
   - Part of ISO evidence code review project for tubulin alpha paralogs
   - Files include YAML review, TSV data, UniProt text, and multiple publication markdown files

d. Main tasks:
   - Read the CLAUDE.md file to understand project guidelines
   - Examine the main review file (Tuba1a-ai-review.yaml)
   - Check data files for consistency
   - Review publication files
   - Validate against schema and best practices
   - Provide constructive feedback

e. Plan of action:
   - Read CLAUDE.md for repo-specific guidelines
   - Examine the main gene review YAML file
   - Check a few publication files for format consistency
   - Run validation if tools are available
   - Provide comprehensive review feedback in GitHub comment

f. Potential limitations: I may not be able to run the validation commands (like `just validate`) if the necessary tools aren't installed or I lack permissions. I'll explain this in my feedback if encountered.
</analysis>

I'll review this pull request focusing on the ISO-focused review of mouse Tuba1a annotations. Let me start by creating a todo list and examining the files.

input.body: ### PR Review: Mouse Tuba1a ISO Annotations Reviewing this ISO-focused gene annotation review for mouse Tuba1a. #### Todo List: - [ ] Read repository guidelines (CLAUDE.md) - [ ] Examine main gene review file structure - [ ] Validate YAML schema compliance - [ ] Review annotation decisions and evidence assessment - [ ] Check publication file consistency - [ ] Assess overall code quality and best practices - [ ] Provide comprehensive feedback [View job run](https://github.com/ai4curation/ai-gene-review/actions/runs/23334888866)
